a:Tbce,<div class="question">
<p>Three identical resistors each of resistance <em>R</em> are connected with a variable resistor X as shown. X is initially set to <em>R</em>. The current in the cell is 0.60 A.</p>
<p>The cell has negligible internal resistance.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>X is now set to zero. What is the current in the cell?</p>
<p>A.  0.45 A</p>
<p>B.  0.60 A</p>
<p>C.  0.90 A</p>
<p>D.  1.80 A</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/5/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","5"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ1.21"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","5-2-heating-effect-of-electric-currents"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Option C was the most common (correct) answer, however option B was also a frequent response.
